ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each story */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the story */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the story in the game timeline */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the story in the game timeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the story was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the modifier */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the story was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story this event belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., quest, boss fight, mission) */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is triggered */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_relationships" (
  "event_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main event */,
  "related_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., prerequisite, consequence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event this condition is associated with */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., entry, quest, boss, mission, time, story) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the condition (e.g., equals, greater than, less than) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_logs" (
  "condition_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who met the condition */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that was met */,
  "meet_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was met */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition (e.g., met, unmet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "xp_reward" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for completing the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_objectives" (
  "quest_objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest objective */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest this objective belongs to */,
  "objective_type" TEXT /* Type of objective (e.g., kill, collect, explore) */,
  "objective_value" TEXT /* Value of the objective (e.g., number of kills, items to collect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_objectives_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bosses" (
  "boss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boss */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the boss */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the boss */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the boss */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage the boss can inflict */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for defeating the boss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boss_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the mission */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the mission */,
  "xp_reward" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for completing the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_objectives" (
  "mission_objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission objective */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission this objective belongs to */,
  "objective_type" TEXT /* Type of objective (e.g., kill, collect, explore) */,
  "objective_value" TEXT /* Value of the objective (e.g., number of kills, items to collect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_objectives_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_conditions" (
  "time_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-based condition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event this condition is associated with */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the condition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for the condition */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week when the condition is active (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "inventory" TEXT /* Inventory of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player progress log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest or mission was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quest or mission (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who triggered the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was triggered */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
